releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Release Notes for Version 1.2.0

## New Features
- Added support for the Periodic Notes plugin as an alternative to the core Daily Notes plugin
- Added configuration option to choose where new pinned daily notes should appear (Editor, Left Sidebar, or Right Sidebar) (Thanks to @newbieJanghan)
releases.name: Release 1.2.0
